cit.basis: Standard 15% corporate income tax under the Tax Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan.
cit.note: Administered by the State Tax Committee. Banks, mobile (cellular) operators and cement producers are taxed at a higher 20% rate.

personal_income_tax.note: Individual income tax generally 12% flat on employment income (indicative).

sources.name: State Tax Committee of the Republic of Uzbekistan

metadata.ai_estimated_caveat: These rates and parameters are AI-estimated and have NOT been verified against primary legislation. Verify against the State Tax Committee (soliq.uz) and a local tax advisor before any filing or production use.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Sector-specific higher rates, turnover-tax regimes, relief, and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
